name: HNS_INJURED_PERSONS_
description: HNS INJURED PERSONS. This table stores injured person related data.

columns.Name: INJURED_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: INJURED_PERSON_ID unique identifier. Primary key for HNS_INJURED_PERSON table.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_DETAIL_ID
columns.Comments: Incident Detail identifier. Foreign key for HNS_INCIDENTS_DETAIL table.

columns.Name: INJ_PERSON_SUMMARY_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key for hns_injured_persons_summary table.

columns.Name: INCI_INJ_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Employee ID of the injured person . The column will be blank if the injured person is not an employee.

columns.Name: INCI_INJ_PERSON_ASSIGN_ID
columns.Comments: Assignment ID of the injured person . The column will be blank if the injured person is not an employee.

columns.Name: INJURED_NAME
columns.Comments: The name of the person (employee/non employee) who got injured.

columns.Name: INJURED_EMAIL
columns.Comments: The email ID of the person (employee/ non employee) injured.

columns.Name: INJURED_COUNTRY_CODE_NUM
columns.Comments: INJURED_COUNTRY_CODE_NUM column : Injured Person phone country code number.

columns.Name: INJURED_AREA_CODE
columns.Comments: INJURED_AREA_CODE column : Injured Person phone area code.

columns.Name: INJURED_PHONENO
columns.Comments: The phone number of the person (employee/ non employee) injured.

columns.Name: INJ_PERSON_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Injured person type. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP EMP/NON EMP lookup.

columns.Name: ILLNESS_NATURE_CODE
columns.Comments: Injured Person Illness nature Code. This column is optional and populated if the nature is illness.

columns.Name: CLASSIFICATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Type of injury (injury/ illness/fatality). Lookup FND_LOOKUP CLASSIFICATION_ID

columns.Name: INJ_PER_NONEMP_TYPE_CD
columns.Comments: Lookup column for non employee type code. FND_Lookup HNS_NON_EMPLOYEE_TYPE

columns.Name: REPORTABLE_FLAG
columns.Comments: REPORTABLE flag. This column signifies whether the injury is reportable.

columns.Name: WORKRELATED_FLAG
columns.Comments: WORK RELATED flag. Is the injury work related.

columns.Name: DELETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to check whether is record is deleted.

columns.Name: TIME_STARTED_WORK
columns.Comments: Time when the injured person started the work.

columns.Name: LOSTTIME_FLAG
columns.Comments: lost time flag. Signifies whether there was a lost of time due to injury.

columns.Name: LOST_TIME_IN_HRS
columns.Comments: Number of hours lost due to the incident. This is asociated with the inury.

columns.Name: RECURRING_FLAG
columns.Comments: Recurring flag.This column signifies whetherthe injury/incident is  recurring.

columns.Name: TREATMENT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Treatment flag.This column signifies whether there was a treatment.

columns.Name: TREATMENT_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Treatment Type identifier. Lookup FND_LOOKUP TREATMENT_TYPE.

columns.Name: FATALITY_DATE
columns.Comments: The date the fatality occured if any. This column is related to injury/illness incident.

columns.Name: MED_PROF_NAME
columns.Comments: Medical profession name incase there was a treatment.

columns.Name: FACILITY_ADDRESS_LINE1
columns.Comments: Facility address Line1 of the medical professional.

columns.Name: FACILITY_ADDRESS_LINE2
columns.Comments: Facility address Line2 of the medical professional.

columns.Name: FACILITY_CITY
columns.Comments: Facility city of the medical professional.

columns.Name: FACILITY_COUNTRY
columns.Comments: Facility country of the medical professional.

columns.Name: FACILITY_STATE
columns.Comments: Facility state of the medical professional.

columns.Name: FACILITY_ZIP_CODE
columns.Comments: Facility zipcode of the medical professional.

columns.Name: PERSON_ACTIVITY_DESCR
columns.Comments: Description of the activity for the injuried person.

columns.Name: PER_INFORMED_INJ_ILL_DATE
columns.Comments: Date and Time Person was Informed about the Injury, Illness or Fatality.

columns.Name: INJ_ILL_INFRMD_BY_PER_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the Person Informed about the Injury, Illness or Fatality.

columns.Name: INJ_ILL_OCCURED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date and Time Injury, Illness or Fatality Occurred.

columns.Name: TIME_FINISHED_WORK
columns.Comments: Date and Time Finished Work.

columns.Name: HRS_AT_WRK_BEFORE_INJ_ILL
columns.Comments: Number of Hours at Work Before Injury, Illness or Fatality Occurred.

columns.Name: REGULATOR_NOTIFIED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Regulator Notified Flag.

columns.Name: REGULATOR_NOTIFIED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date and Time Regulator Notified.

columns.Name: REGULATOR_NOTIFIED_BY
columns.Comments: Regulator Notified by Whom.

columns.Name: REGULATR_NOTIFIED_MEDIUM_CD
columns.Comments: How was the regulator notified.Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_HOW_NOTIFIED.

columns.Name: RECORDABLE_TYPE_CD
columns.Comments: Recordable Type.Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_RECORDABLE_TYPE.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION_OF_TREATMENT
columns.Comments: Description of Treatment.

columns.Name: FACILITY_NAME
columns.Comments: Facility Name.

columns.Name: PREV_INJ_ILL_DATE
columns.Comments: Date of Previous Injury or Illness.

columns.Name: INJ_ILL_DEV_OVER_TIME_FLAG
columns.Comments: Did the injury or illness develop over time.

columns.Name: SYM_FIRST_NOTICED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Symptoms First Noticed.

columns.Name: PER_UNABLE_TO_WRK_FLAG
columns.Comments: Was the person unable to work for at least one full day after the injury or illness.

columns.Name: DAYS_AWAY_FROM_WRK
columns.Comments: Number of Days Away from Work.

columns.Name: DISAB_DAYS_AWY_FRM_WRK_DT
columns.Comments: Date that Disability or Days Away from Work Began.

columns.Name: EMP_RTN_TO_WRK_FLAG
columns.Comments: Has the employee returned to work Flag.

columns.Name: RTN_TO_WRK_DATE
columns.Comments: Return to Work Date.

columns.Name: RTN_TO_WRK_TYPE_CD
columns.Comments: Return to Work Type.Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_RETURN_TO_WORK.

columns.Name: XFR_RESTRICTN_DAYS
columns.Comments: Number of Days on Transfer or Restriction.

columns.Name: MOD_DUTIES_RESTRICTN_DESCR
columns.Comments: Describe Modified Duties or Restrictions.

columns.Name: SOURCE_OF_INJURY_LVL2_CODE
columns.Comments: Source of Injury Level 2. Used to declare the level 2 sources for injury or illness analysis. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_SOURCE_II.

columns.Name: SOURCE_OF_INJURY_LVL3_CODE
columns.Comments: Source of Injury Level 3. Used to declare the level 3 sources for injury or illness analysis. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_SOURCE_LEVEL_III.

columns.Name: SOURCE_OF_INJURY_LVL4_CODE
columns.Comments: Source of Injury Level 4. Used to declare the level 4 sources for injury or illness analysis. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_SOURCE_LEVEL_IV.

columns.Name: INJURY_MECHANISM_LVL2_CODE
columns.Comments: Mechanism of Injury Level 2. Used to declare the level 2 mechanisms for injury or illness analysis. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_MECHANISM_II.

columns.Name: INJURY_MECHANISM_LVL3_CODE
columns.Comments: Mechanism of Injury Level 3. Used to declare the level 3 mechanisms for injury or illness analysis. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_MECHANISM_III.

columns.Name: INJURY_MECHANISM_LVL4_CODE
columns.Comments: Mechanism of Injury Level 4. Used to declare the level 4 mechanisms for injury or illness analysis. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_MECHANISM_IV.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: RECORDABLE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Recordable Flag Column. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: JOB_TRANSFER_FLAG
columns.Comments: Job Transfer or Restriction Flag Column. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.YES_NO.

columns.Name: INJURY_MECHANISM_CODE
columns.Comments: Mechanism of Injury Column. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_MECHANISM.

columns.Name: SOURCE_OF_INJURY_CODE
columns.Comments: Source of Injury Column. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_SOURCE.

columns.Name: CASE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Unique system generated sequential case number of injured or ill person record.

columns.Name: TX_FACILITY_ZIP_CODE
columns.Comments: Treatment Facility zipcode of the medical professional.
